features.title: More than just inspection
features.subtitle: Every competitor stops at "see the CSS." StyleSnap gives you the full pipeline — from discovery to code.

items.title: Instant CSS Inspection
items.desc: Hover over any element to see its full computed styles organized by category. Click to lock and keep the overlay visible.

items.title: Design Panel
items.desc: Extract a page's entire color palette, font stack, and spacing/radius scale in one click. Switch between HEX, RGB, HSL. Export as CSS variables or JSON.

items.title: Tailwind Conversion
items.desc: Deterministic CSS-to-Tailwind mapping — no AI hallucination. Every class maps precisely to the original CSS value.

items.title: Live CSS Editing
items.desc: Edit any property in the overlay and see changes instantly on the page. Perfect for prototyping and design exploration.

items.title: Box Model Visualizer
items.desc: A nested margin-border-padding-content diagram appears next to the overlay when you lock an element. See exactly how spacing is composed.

items.title: Accessibility-Aware AI Prompts
items.desc: StyleSnap reads the element's ARIA roles and writes a prompt that tells the AI to implement keyboard navigation, focus management, and state — then output React, Vue, or HTML. Paste into Claude, ChatGPT, or Cursor.
See a component you want? Hover, lock, copy as Tailwind or an AI prompt. No DevTools digging. No manual conversion. Paste and ship.
items.highlight: Tailwind Conversion · Live Edit · AI Prompts

items.desc: Need a palette or font stack from a reference site? Open the Design panel — all colors and fonts in one view. Copy what you need.
Want to communicate a design decision? Lock elements, capture their exact styles, and use the Box Model diagram to clarify spacing.

css-to-tailwind-guide.title: The Complete Guide to Converting CSS to Tailwind Classes
content: Converting CSS to Tailwind utility classes is one of the most common tasks when modernizing a frontend codebase. But doing it manually is error-prone and tedious — that's why StyleSnap includes a deterministic conversion engine.

Tools that rely on LLMs to convert CSS to Tailwind classes often produce incorrect results. An LLM might map `padding: 0.75rem` to `p-3` (correct) but could just as easily output `p-2` or `px-3 py-2` depending on the context.
StyleSnap uses a rule-based engine with complete coverage of Tailwind's utility class catalog. Every CSS property-value pair maps to exactly one Tailwind class. There's no hallucination.

- Arbitrary values: `margin: 13px` → `m-[13px]`
- Responsive variants: preserved as prefixes
- Custom theme values: mapped when the Tailwind config is available

design-tokens-workflow.title: From Website to Design System: Exporting Design Tokens
content: Design tokens are the atomic building blocks of a design system — colors, spacing, typography, and more. StyleSnap's Design panel automates the extraction.

With one click, the Design panel scans the current page and extracts:
- **Color palette**: Grouped by frequency, with HEX/RGB/HSL switching
- **Font stack**: Every font-family on the page, with live preview rendering

- **CSS Variables**: Direct `--color-primary: #4f46e5` output
- **JSON**: Structured format for design tools
- **Individual copy**: Click any swatch to copy its value

stylesnap-vs-cssscan.title: StyleSnap vs the Competition: What's Actually Different
content: There are several CSS inspection tools out there. Here's what makes StyleSnap different.
### Design Panel — No other tool gives you a page-wide color palette + font stack in one click with format switching.
### Box Model Visualizer — The nested margin-border-padding-content diagram is unique to StyleSnap.
### Price — $29 one-time. The cheapest in the category, with the most features.

items.a: StyleSnap works on Microsoft Edge and Google Chrome (Manifest V3). Firefox support is planned.

items.q: How is Tailwind conversion different from AI tools?
items.a: StyleSnap uses a deterministic rule engine — every CSS property maps to exactly one Tailwind class. No hallucination, no guessing.
No. $29 one-time purchase. You get lifetime updates, no recurring fees, no usage limits.

items.q: Does it work on any website?
items.a: Yes. Any website you visit in your browser — no configuration, no API keys. Works on localhost too.

items.q: What's included in the Design panel?
items.a: The Design panel extracts the page's color palette (grouped by frequency) and font stack (with live preview). Switch between HEX, RGB, HSL. Export individually or as a full palette.

items.q: How is StyleSnap different from browser DevTools?
items.a: DevTools gives you raw CSS. StyleSnap organizes it by category, lets you edit live, converts to Tailwind, shows a Box Model diagram, and tracks inspection history — all in a clean overlay.

items.q: What if I don't like it?
items.a: 7-day money-back guarantee. Email us and we'll refund — no questions.

items.q: Does it slow down my browser?
items.a: No. StyleSnap only activates when you click the extension icon. Near-zero performance impact.
